name: Chervenian Bulava
description: The Chervenian nobility is small but proud. Centuries of rivalry with the rest of Nistra's aristocracy have driven them to cultivate a unique style in dress and arms, ensuring they always stand out.
descriptionZh: 车尔文贵族人数稀少，孤芳自赏，与尼斯特拉其他民族的贵族对立了数百年之久，服装与武器因而形成了独特的风格与形制，彰显了这个民族的与众不同。
